Title: GAJ-UI-001 - Page loads without critical error
Steps:
1. Open the target page.
2. Wait for page load.
3. Check for major visible error states.
Expected Result: Page loads successfully without a critical error.

Title: GAJ-UI-002 - Primary CTA is visible and actionable
Steps:
1. Locate primary CTA.
2. Click or inspect destination.
3. Verify expected navigation/action.
Expected Result: Primary CTA is visible and leads to the expected flow.

Title: GAJ-UI-003 - Header/navigation links do not break primary flow
Steps:
1. Click primary nav links.
2. Observe route changes.
3. Confirm no broken or blank pages.
Expected Result: Navigation works without broken pages or dead ends.
